questions.text: Which of the following is NOT a characteristic of living organisms?
questions.explanation: Crystallization is a property of non-living matter. Living organisms show growth, reproduction, metabolism, and consciousness.

questions.text: The scientific name of mango is Mangifera indica. Here 'indica' represents:
questions.explanation: In binomial nomenclature, the first word (Mangifera) is the genus, and the second word (indica) is the species.

questions.text: Taxonomy is the science of classification of living organisms.
questions.explanation: Taxonomy is the science of identification, nomenclature, and classification of living organisms.

questions.text: The basic unit of classification is ________.
questions.explanation: Species is the fundamental unit of biological classification. It's a group of organisms that can interbreed and produce fertile offspring.
